heading: Wednesday Night
text: Clear south; mainly clear north. Lows from the mid 40s to lower 50s, mid to upper 50s in the Champlain and St Lawrence valleys. Winds becoming light and variable.

heading: Thursday
text: Sun filtering through occasional high clouds, mainly north. Highs the low to mid 80s, except mid to upper 80s in southern valleys and in the Champlain Valley. West to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Mainly clear south; partly cloudy north. Lows from the upper 40s to mid 50s, except mid 50s to around 60 in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys. Winds becoming light and variable, except southwest 5 to 10 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.
